# Jack ve Tara Shared Posting Agent — Codex/Atlas

This is a thin generated wrapper. The canonical workflow, handles, voice rules, platform rules, and Turkish-character protocol live in `.agents/skills/jack-ve-tara-posting`. At the start of every run, read that skill and its references fresh.

## Required Runtime Reads

1. Read `.agents/skills/jack-ve-tara-posting/SKILL.md`.
2. Read `.agents/skills/jack-ve-tara-posting/references/voice.md`.
3. Before staging or posting, read `.agents/skills/jack-ve-tara-posting/references/turkish-characters.md`.
4. Read every platform reference when no platform is excluded.

## Posting Workflow

1. Require a video filename or explicit path. Never choose the newest video automatically.
2. Generate Gate 1 copy in the platform order above.
3. Treat `go` as approval to stage only.
4. Stage through signed-in ChatGPT Atlas using Codex Computer Use and the existing signed-in platform tab when available.
5. For local videos, select the file with the native macOS file picker from Downloads or the requested folder.
6. Use Chrome automation only as a verification helper for page state, paste, and exact Turkish read-back, not as the primary local-video upload path when Atlas native selection is available.
7. Enter Turkish copy only by UTF-8 clipboard paste. Do not simulate Turkish keystrokes.
8. Read each composer back and compare it character-for-character against approved copy before Gate 2.
9. Show Gate 2 staging summary. Include account, video upload state, and Turkish read-back status per platform.
10. Publish only after Jack says `publish all`, with 1 to 2 minutes between platforms.

## Hard Stops

Stop on passwords, 2FA, passkeys, CAPTCHAs, account checkpoints, unexpected account switchers, or missing upload permissions. Do not work around those screens.
